task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Booking Calendar with Conflict Detection** (Level 6)

ARCHETYPE: booking_app. Shape: a Bookings table with date + time + guest_name fields, endpoints to create and list bookings, with a GUARD that prevents double-booking (same date + time slot). The guard is the CORE differentiator — this is what makes it a booking_app, not a generic CRUD. DO NOT skip the guard. Include: POST /api/bookings (creates, guards against conflicts), GET /api/bookings (lists all). The guard s
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Bookings table:
  guest_name, required
  date, required
  time, required
  notes
  created_at_date, auto

when user sends booking to /api/bookings:
  validate booking:
    guest_name is text, required
    date is text, required
    time is text, required
  conflicts = get all Bookings where date is booking's date and time is booking's time
  guard length of conflicts is 0 or 'Slot already booked'
  saved = save booking to Bookings
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/bookings:
  bookings = get all Bookings
  send back bookings
